result.summary: CarGurus exposes a public MCP server, a public Car Selector HTTP API, a dealer/SEM developer API family documented under /Cars/developers that generally uses CarGurus-issued appId + authToken, a Partner Metrics HTTP surface keyed by dealer access key, and a public CWV data API with an OpenAPI spec.
result.description: CarGurus is an automotive marketplace for researching, buying, and selling vehicles, with listings, dealer information, reviews, and pricing tools. It also provides dealer- and partner-oriented integration endpoints for inventory stats, messaging, search widgets, and website metrics.

cg_appid.label: CarGurus application ID
cg_appid.setup: Request API access from CarGurus through the [CarGurus Developers portal](https://www.cargurus.com/Cars/developers/). The API docs state `appId` is "provided by CarGurus" for these dealer/SEM APIs, so you must obtain it directly from CarGurus as part of API onboarding.

cg_auth_token.label: CarGurus auth token
cg_auth_token.setup: Request API access from CarGurus through the [CarGurus Developers portal](https://www.cargurus.com/Cars/developers/). The API docs state `authToken` is "provided by CarGurus" and required alongside `appId` for dealer and SEM APIs, so you must obtain it directly from CarGurus as part of API onboarding.

cg_partner_access_key.label: CarGurus Partner Metrics access key
cg_partner_access_key.setup: Obtain the dealer-specific access key from CarGurus. The [Partner Metrics installation page](https://www.cargurus.com/Cars/webhosts/docs/PartnerMetrics.html?key=00000000-0000-0c01-0000-00000000ee96) says `Access Key (unique for each dealer): Enter the access key received from the dealer`. You paste that key into the JavaScript snippet or image beacon URL CarGurus provides for website metrics setup.

surfaces.name: CarGurus Core Web Vitals Data API
